title: There’s a Lesson in That Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A black rock burned for heat and energy
rounds.answer: coal
rounds.explanation: coal: A black rock burned for heat and energy

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A group of living things that are similar
rounds.answer: species
rounds.explanation: species: A group of living things that are similar

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A family member who lived a long time ago
rounds.answer: ancestor
rounds.explanation: ancestor: A family member who lived a long time ago

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A small bag or pocket that can hold things
rounds.answer: pouch

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Having a shiny, silver colour like metal
rounds.answer: silvery

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.answer: residence

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: We use coal to help make electricity for our homes.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: Marine animals like dolphins and whales live in the ocean.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: Finding water was essential for their survival in the desert.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Silence After the Rumble, part 1': Others had moved to different _____ of the country.
rounds.answer: regions
rounds.explanation: The text says: Others had moved to different regions of the country.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Silence After the Rumble, part 1': One _____ morning, she arrived early.
rounds.answer: misty
rounds.explanation: The text says: One misty morning, she arrived early.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Silence After the Rumble, part 1': She felt a strange _____ in her chest — the kind that grows when you are about to speak.
rounds.answer: anxiety
rounds.explanation: The text says: She felt a strange anxiety in her chest — the kind that grows when you are about to speak.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Discussion Questions
rounds.target: We use coal to help make electricity for our homes.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Retell a Story
rounds.target: Marine animals like dolphins and whales live in the ocean.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5: Explain and Respond
rounds.target: Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The rural village had many farms and open fields.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Their residence is a small house with a big garden.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The noble leader always put her people first.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'survival' mean in this unit?
choices: Continuing to live, especially in hard conditions
A black rock burned for heat and energy
To meet or come across someone by chance
rounds.answer: Continuing to live, especially in hard conditions
rounds.explanation: survival: Continuing to live, especially in hard conditions

rounds.prompt: What does 'contain' mean in this unit?
choices: A black rock burned for heat and energy
To meet or come across someone by chance
To have something inside or hold something
rounds.answer: To have something inside or hold something
rounds.explanation: contain: To have something inside or hold something

rounds.prompt: What does 'encounter' mean in this unit?
choices: When the air has tiny water drops, making it hard to see
To meet or come across someone by chance
A black rock burned for heat and energy
rounds.answer: To meet or come across someone by chance
rounds.explanation: encounter: To meet or come across someone by chance

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'continental'?
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: continental is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'role'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: role is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'marine'?
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: marine is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: To meet or come across someone by chance
When the air has tiny water drops, making it hard to see
A person who was born in a particular place

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: Continuing to live, especially in hard conditions
Related to the countryside, not the city
Related to a city or town

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: To have something inside or hold something
Having good qualities like honesty and kindness
To move slowly dragging your feet, or to mix things up

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'regions' mean?
choices: A feeling of worry or nervousness
A person who was born in a particular place
Areas or parts of a country with something in common
Related to the sea or ocean
rounds.answer: Areas or parts of a country with something in common
rounds.explanation: There are many different regions in our country, each with its own culture.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Silence After the Rumble, part 2': A pot of tea boiled over a _____ stove in the courtyard.
rounds.answer: coal
rounds.explanation: The text says: A pot of tea boiled over a coal stove in the courtyard.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Silence After the Rumble, part 2': He wore clean clothes and held a folded paper in his _____.
rounds.answer: pouch
rounds.explanation: The text says: He wore clean clothes and held a folded paper in his pouch.
